summary: Admin Dashboard operational improvements testing - All features verified. New 'Scadenze Pronostici' block present between Allarmi Critici and Utenti with correct data-testid. Match Status counters (Live ora, Senza risultato, Inconsistenti) are clickable with cursor:pointer and onclick handlers. Pagamenti section shows all 5 KPI counters with euro symbol. Backend API returns upcoming_deadlines key with correct structure.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard at /api/admin-ui fully tested. All new features verified: 1) Scadenze Pronostici block with data-testid='upcoming-deadlines' shows between Allarmi and Utenti, 2) Match Status counters are clickable with cursor:pointer and onclick, 3) Allarmi Critici rows have Vai links, 4) Pagamenti shows 5 counters with € symbol.
